tools.name: schedule-reminder
tools.description: Schedule a reminder message to be sent at a specific time. Supports natural language time expressions.

time.description: Time expression. Examples: "at 17:00", "at 5:30pm", "tomorrow at 9:00", "in 30 minutes", "in 2 hours", "in 1 hour and 30 minutes", or ISO format "2025-10-28T17:00:00"

channelId.description: Channel ID where the reminder should be sent

tools.name: list-reminders
tools.description: List all pending reminders, optionally filtered by channel ID

channelId.description: Optional channel ID to filter reminders

tools.name: cancel-reminder
tools.description: Cancel a pending reminder by its ID

reminderId.description: The ID of the reminder to cancel

tools.name: create-recurring-task
tools.description: Create a recurring task using cron expression. Examples: '0 9 * * *' (daily at 9am), '0 10-22 * * 1-5' (hourly on weekdays 10am-10pm)

cronExpression.description: Cron expression (5 fields: minute hour day month weekday). Examples: "0 9 * * *", "0 10-22 * * 1-5", "*/15 * * * *"

message.description: The message to send on each execution

channelId.description: Channel ID where messages should be sent

tools.name: list-recurring-tasks
tools.description: List all recurring tasks, optionally filtered by channel ID

channelId.description: Optional channel ID to filter tasks

taskId.description: The ID of the task to enable
The ID of the task to disable
The ID of the task to delete
